'''Pelagon Aquatic Components Corporation''' or '''PACC''' was a major corporation on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Pelagon]]. It specialized in the production of aquatic vehicles for use on the water world of Pelagon and the worlds of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. The company was created by a group of engineers from [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]]. The engineers were lured away from Sienar by [[House Pelagia]] to produce a local vehicle manufacturing company near their realm of influence. After the fall of House Pelagia from the efforts of [[House Mecetti]], PACC was able to stay in business. This allowed House Pelagia to retain some of its power after its downfall.<ref name="LOTE" />
